name: P-3 Wash
comment: The P-3 Wash is part of the revolutionary family of SGM Light 3 Series fixtures. The 3 Series introduces numerous features and performance improvements which makes it unique amongst fixtures in this size class. Incorporating a >12,700 lumen illumination LED engine this compact powerhouse can be used as a color strobe or for illumination, arrayed in grids, used in LED screen borders, arranged in LED extensions, or used as stage outlines.
